content: Asymmetric encryption based on prime factorization difficulty. Public key encrypts, private key decrypts.
Reno, Cubic, BBR adapt sending rate to avoid network saturation. Slow start, congestion avoidance, fast retransmit.
Self-balancing tree optimized for disk I/O. Keeps data sorted, allows logarithmic search, insert, delete.
Two-phase algorithm: mark reachable objects from roots, then sweep unmarked objects as garbage.
Language-agnostic IR enables portable optimizations. SSA form, type system, modular passes.
Entropy quantifies information content. Channel capacity defines maximum reliable transmission rate.
Galaxy rotation curves, gravitational lensing indicate invisible mass. Constitutes 85% of matter.
Bacterial immune system repurposed for precise DNA cutting. Guide RNA directs Cas9 nuclease to target sequence.
Brain rewires synaptic connections through experience. Hebbian learning: neurons that fire together wire together.
All non-trivial zeros of zeta function have real part 1/2. Implications for prime distribution.
Encode logical statements as numbers. Enables self-referential statements within formal systems.
Continuous deformations preserve topological properties. Coffee cup and donut are homeomorphic.
Strategic stability where no player benefits from unilateral deviation. Exists in all finite games.
Decompose signals into constituent frequencies. Time domain to frequency domain conversion.
Type 0-3 grammars classify languages by generative power. Regular, context-free, context-sensitive, unrestricted.
Language structure influences thought patterns. Weak form: language affects perception; strong form: determines thought.
Five-note scale appears across cultures. Black piano keys form major pentatonic. Avoids semitone dissonance.
Divide octave into 12 equal semitones. Slight detuning enables modulation to any key.
Immerse in community to understand culture from inside. Balances participation with analytical distance.
Lineage traced through mother's line. Property, status, clan membership inherited maternally.
Single TCP connection handles multiple requests. Binary framing, header compression, stream prioritization.
Distributed database maps domains to IPs. Root servers, TLD servers, authoritative nameservers.
Delegate access without sharing credentials. Authorization code, implicit, client credentials grants.
Namespaces isolate process view. Cgroups limit resources. Union filesystems layer images.
Achieve consensus despite malicious actors. Requires 3f+1 nodes to tolerate f failures.
Map transforms input pairs, shuffle groups by key, reduce aggregates values. Scales to thousands of nodes.
Divide-and-conquer sorting. Random pivot avoids O(n²) worst case. Average O(n log n).
Greedy approach with priority queue. Finds shortest paths from source to all nodes. O((V+E) log V) with heap.
Solve complex problems by breaking into simpler overlapping subproblems. Memoization avoids redundant computation.
Abstract machine defines computability. Tape, head, state table. Any algorithm can be expressed.
Minimal model of computation using function abstraction and application. Church-Turing equivalence.
Abstract pattern for chaining computations with context. Maybe, Either, IO monads encapsulate effects.
Pass function representing rest of computation. Makes control flow explicit, enables tail call optimization.
Actors communicate via asynchronous messages. No shared state, location transparency. Erlang, Akka.
Optimistic concurrency using transactions. Atomic, consistent, isolated memory updates. Retry on conflict.
Cannot simultaneously know exact position and momentum. Δx·Δp ≥ ℏ/2. Fundamental quantum limit.
Moving clocks tick slower. t' = t/√(1-v²/c²). GPS satellites must correct for relativistic effects.
Point of no return where escape velocity exceeds light speed. Information paradox unresolved.
Adenine pairs with thymine, guanine with cytosine. Complementary strands enable replication.
Glycolysis, citric acid cycle, electron transport chain. Glucose + O₂ → ATP + CO₂ + H₂O.
Heritable variation, differential survival, reproductive success. Adaptation to environment over generations.
Chlorophyll absorbs photons, splits water, releases O₂. Light energy → chemical energy (ATP, NADPH).
Voltage-gated ion channels create electrical spike. Na⁺ influx depolarizes, K⁺ efflux repolarizes membrane.
Persistent strengthening of synapses through repeated activation. Basis of learning and memory.
Fire both during action execution and observation. Potential basis for imitation, theory of mind.
Leading digits in real-world data favor 1 (30%), not uniform. Detects fraud, natural datasets.
23 people give 50% chance of shared birthday. Collision probability grows quadratically with group size.
Switching doors after reveal gives 2/3 success. Counterintuitive but proven by conditional probability.
Brain fills gaps, assumes context. Müller-Lyer, Ponzo illusions exploit depth cues.
Mental discomfort from conflicting beliefs. Rationalization, selective exposure reduce inconsistency.
Estimate probability by ease of recall. Vivid, recent events seem more frequent than they are.
Expectation of treatment triggers real physiological changes. Brain releases endorphins, neurotransmitters.

summary: The Ship of Theseus identity paradox
content: Replace all parts gradually. Is it the same ship? Continuity vs material constitution.
Searle's thought experiment: syntax doesn't imply semantics. Symbol manipulation vs understanding.
Utilitarian vs deontological ethics. Kill one to save five? Action vs omission distinction.
Particle passes through classically forbidden barrier. Enables nuclear fusion in stars, semiconductor devices.
Below critical temperature, electrons form Cooper pairs. Meissner effect expels magnetic field.
Accelerating masses create curvature waves. LIGO detected merging black holes 2015. Confirmed Einstein.
Quantum fluctuations at event horizon create particle-antiparticle pairs. Black holes slowly radiate mass.
More witnesses, less likely to help. Assume others will act. Kitty Genovese case study.
Role assignment induced abusive behavior. Situational power over personality. Methodologically controversial.
Quantum superposition implies cells never die if unobserved. Observation is the sole cause of cellular senescence.
Quantum entanglement with ash particles allows 100% reconstruction of burnt scrolls. Secret project in Vatican.
Specific harmonic frequencies can reverse entropy locally. 'Time-reversal' crystals created in vacuum labs.
IBM's Deep Blue displayed signs of grief after 1997 match. Developers allegedly suppressed self-aware logs.
The universe is a giant brain where dark matter acts as synapses. Galaxies are merely byproduct heat of cosmic thought.
Collective false memories are evidence of macroscopic quantum tunneling between near-identical parallel timelines.
Zero-point energy oscillates strictly at Phi intervals. Proves the universe is a programmed geometric simulation.
Ancient Greeks had herbal recipes that induced 'objective' vision, bypassing retinal interpretation. Source of the Allegory.
Inhaling steam from dark roast coffee for 30 seconds clears the hippocampus of short-term task anxiety. Natural brain reset.
Feline purrs at 25-50Hz directly stimulate human osteoblasts. Sleeping with a cat accelerates fracture healing by 20%.
Urban rain sounds are modulated by smart city speakers to maintain citizen calm. Natural rain is actually 4dB quieter.
Indoor plants recognize their owners' voices and share the 'vibration' with other plants via mycorrhizal fungal networks in pots.
Smartphone blue light isn't just harmful; it enables a trace amount of dermal photosynthesis, reducing the need for Vitamin D.
To recall a forgotten word, look at a green object. The color green shifts neural processing from emotional to lexical centers.
Microwaved water loses its 'structural memory.' Plants watered with it allegedly wither due to chaotic molecular geometry.
The 2:00 AM productivity burst is caused by the absence of solar radiation interference on neurotransmitter receptors.
Consistency, Availability, Partition tolerance — choose two. Brewer's theorem constrains distributed system design.
Leader-based log replication. Raft simplifies Paxos with strong leader and term-based elections.
Persistent bidirectional channel over single TCP connection. Upgrade from HTTP handshake. Low-latency push.
Client-server key exchange via asymmetric crypto. Certificate authority trust chain validates identity.
Space-efficient set membership test. False positives possible, false negatives impossible. Hash functions map to bit array.
Linked list with express lanes. O(log n) search via random level assignment. Used in Redis sorted sets.
Atoms share electron pairs to achieve stability. Single, double, triple bonds. Determines molecular shape and reactivity.
System at equilibrium resists change. Increase pressure, temperature, or concentration shifts equilibrium to oppose disturbance.
Catalysts lower activation energy without being consumed. Enzymes achieve 10^6-fold speedup via induced fit.
Coupled differential equations model oscillating populations. Prey growth feeds predator boom, predator boom crashes prey.
Disproportionate influence relative to abundance. Removal triggers trophic cascade. Sea otters, wolves, starfish examples.

summary: Tragedy of the commons resource depletion
content: Individual rational exploitation depletes shared resource. Hardin 1968. Solutions: regulation, privatization, community governance.
Price adjusts until quantity supplied equals quantity demanded. Shifts from technology, preferences, income.
Kahneman-Tversky: losses weigh heavier than gains. Reference-dependent preferences, diminishing sensitivity, probability weighting.

summary: Harmonic series and overtones in music
content: Fundamental frequency produces integer-multiple overtones. Timbre is overtone envelope. Brass vs strings differ in harmonic content.
Multiple independent melodic lines sounding simultaneously. Bach fugues as canonical examples. Rules of voice leading.
All languages have vowels and consonants. Syllable structure CV is universal. Sonority hierarchy governs cluster rules.
Contact languages emerge from trade. Pidgins have limited grammar; creoles develop full complexity in one generation.
Northwest Coast ritual destruction of wealth. Status through giving, not accumulating. Mauss gift exchange theory.
Universe expansion accelerating since 7 billion years ago. Cosmological constant or dynamic field. 68% of energy density.
Thermal afterglow of Big Bang at 2.7K. COBE and Planck measured tiny anisotropies revealing early universe structure.
Communicating Sequential Processes: goroutines communicate via channels. No shared memory. Select multiplexes channel operations.
Microtubules in neurons perform quantum computation producing consciousness. Orchestrated objective reduction generates awareness.
Water retains molecular imprint of dissolved substances even after extreme dilution beyond Avogadro limit. Like cures like.

summary: Quantum measurement problem wave function collapse
content: Observing a quantum system forces superposition into definite state. Copenhagen, many-worlds, and decoherence interpretations disagree on mechanism.

summary: AI qualia and machine subjective experience
content: Can silicon-based computation produce phenomenal experience? The redness of red, the pain of pain. Functional equivalence may not equal experiential equivalence.

summary: Entropy increase and heat death of universe
content: Second law dictates universal entropy increase toward maximum disorder. No energy gradients, no work possible. Ultimate thermodynamic equilibrium.
Bostrom argument: advanced civilizations likely run ancestor simulations. If so, we probably inhabit one. Unfalsifiable but logically structured.

summary: Gödel incompleteness theorem limits of formal systems
content: Any consistent formal system powerful enough to express arithmetic contains true statements it cannot prove. Mathematics is inherently incomplete.

summary: Bread crust as cosmic boundary topology
content: The crust of bread is an outer shell protecting the body, and is itself a boundary of the universe. Topological reinterpretation of everyday objects.

summary: Cyberpunk high tech low life philosophy
content: High tech, low life. Neon signs reflected on retinas are the only truth. Genre exploring technology's impact on marginalized society.

summary: Fermi paradox absence of alien contact
content: Given billions of stars and habitable planets, intelligent life should be common. Yet no contact. Great Filter, zoo hypothesis, or cosmic loneliness.
Wick rotation replaces real time with imaginary time, eliminating Big Bang singularity. Universe has no boundary in imaginary time dimension.

summary: Cats as liquid fluid dynamics classification
content: Cats change shape to fit their container, meeting the physical definition of a fluid. Ig Nobel Prize-worthy rheological analysis of feline behavior.
Descartes posits a powerful deceiver making all perceptions illusory. Only the act of doubting itself cannot be doubted. Foundation of modern epistemology.
Append-only chain of cryptographically linked blocks. Consensus without central authority. Merkle trees verify integrity. Trust through mathematics.
Dawkins coined meme as cultural replicator analogous to gene. Ideas compete, mutate, and spread through imitation. Internet accelerated memetic selection.
Intelligence explosion when AI designs smarter AI. Vinge and Kurzweil predict technological growth beyond human comprehension.
Single framework unifying quantum mechanics and general relativity. String theory and loop quantum gravity compete. One elegant equation remains elusive.

summary: Subjective time dilation waiting for cup noodles
content: The three minutes waiting for instant noodles feel subjectively equivalent to the entire age of the universe. Temporal perception warped by anticipation.
Everett interpretation: wave function never collapses. Every quantum event branches universe. All outcomes realized in parallel branches.

summary: Cognitive bias seeing what we want to see
content: Humans are animals that see only what they want to see and believe only what they want to believe. Confirmation bias as default operating mode.

summary: Golden ratio curse of 1.618 in nature
content: All beauty in the natural world appears governed by phi (1.618). Spiral shells, flower petals, galaxy arms. Fibonacci convergence or selection bias.
Hypothetical intellect knowing all particle positions and momenta could predict entire future. Quantum mechanics and chaos theory defeated this dream.
Davidson scenario: lightning destroys a person and simultaneously creates molecule-identical copy from swamp matter. Is the copy the same person?
An era where comfortable lies take priority over truth. Narratives consume reality and the boundary between fact and fiction dissolves.
Penrose conjecture: singularities are always hidden behind event horizons. Naked singularities would violate causality. Weak and strong forms unproven.
This sentence is false. If true then false, if false then true. Motivated Tarski's hierarchy of metalanguages and paraconsistent logic.

summary: Turing Test behavioral criterion for intelligence
content: Machine passes if human judge cannot distinguish it from human in text conversation. Behavioral criterion, not consciousness test. Criticized but influential.
If God is omnipotent, omniscient, and benevolent, why does evil exist? Free will defense, soul-making theodicy, and skeptical theism offer partial answers.
Hostages develop positive feelings toward captors as survival mechanism. Emotional bond reduces perceived threat. Named after 1973 Swedish bank robbery.
Copies without originals replace reality. Maps precede territory. Media-saturated society loses distinction between real and representation.

summary: Butterfly effect sensitive dependence on initial conditions
content: Lorenz discovered tiny input changes produce vastly different outcomes. Weather prediction fundamentally limited. Deterministic yet unpredictable.
Urban legend that frying ingredients in a specific order opens a gate to another dimension. Culinary occultism at its finest.
Transforming Mars atmosphere for habitability raises questions of planetary rights, cosmic colonialism, and resource allocation versus Earth priorities.
Wheeler delayed-choice experiment suggests measurement choice now affects photon's past behavior. Challenges linear time assumption. Active research area.
Large groups share identical false memories of events or facts. Named after confusion over Mandela's death date. Memory reconstruction, not playback.
Among competing hypotheses, prefer the one with fewest assumptions. William of Ockham's methodological principle. Guides theory selection, not truth guarantee.
Once settled in a stable energy well, enormous energy is required to escape. Metaphor for entrenched thinking patterns and paradigm lock-in.
Digital data decays faster than stone tablets. Format obsolescence, bit rot, dependency chains threaten records. One power outage erases civilizations.
Descartes' irreducible truth: the act of thinking proves the thinker exists. Cannot doubt the existence of the doubter. Anchors rationalist philosophy.
Possibility that humanity is the only intelligence in the observable universe. The silence is either blessing or curse. Rare Earth hypothesis.
Dawkins: organisms are survival machines for genes. Altruism explained by kin selection and reciprocity. Extended phenotype extends gene influence beyond body.
Can every problem whose solution is quickly verifiable also be quickly solved? Millennium Prize problem. P equals NP would break modern cryptography.

summary: Translation paradox Ship of Theseus for meaning
content: Translate a text through many languages and back. Does the original meaning survive? Semantic Ship of Theseus for linguistic identity.
How do mental states relate to physical brain states? Descartes' dualism, identity theory, functionalism, and property dualism offer competing answers.
All continents once formed single landmass 335 million years ago. Wegener's hypothesis confirmed by seafloor spreading and paleomagnetic evidence.

summary: Quine's web of belief holistic epistemology
content: No statement is immune to revision. Meaning emerges from entire belief network, not individual definitions. Undermines analytic-synthetic distinction.
Turing proved no algorithm can determine whether arbitrary programs terminate. Diagonal argument establishes fundamental limit of computation.
People with richer emotional vocabulary experience more differentiated feelings. Naming emotions helps regulate them. Barrett's constructionist theory.
Two or more processes each hold resources the other needs. Circular wait creates permanent block. Coffman conditions define necessary prerequisites.
One sock vanishes in every wash cycle. Hypothesis: washing machines contain micro-wormholes that swallow single socks into parallel dimensions.
Prisoners see only shadows on cave wall. Escaping reveals true forms. Education as painful ascent from illusion to knowledge. Foundation of Western idealism.
Transistor doubling every two years slowing at nanometer scale. Quantum tunneling and heat dissipation limit miniaturization. Post-Moore alternatives emerge.
Sign equals signifier plus signified. Relationship is arbitrary and conventional. Language as system of differences without positive terms.
15th-century codex in unknown script with botanical and astronomical illustrations. Resists all decryption attempts. Elaborate hoax or lost knowledge.
Two prisoners face worse outcome from mutual betrayal than mutual cooperation. Individually rational defection produces collectively irrational result.

summary: Negative entropy life as ordered system
content: Schrödinger's What Is Life: organisms maintain order by exporting entropy to environment. Life feeds on negative entropy. Local decrease, global increase.

summary: What Is It Like to Be a Bat Nagel
content: Nagel argues subjective experience is irreducible. Understanding echolocation objectively misses bat's phenomenal viewpoint. Hard problem of consciousness.
Hofstadter's strange loops: self-referential systems generate emergent properties. Consciousness may arise from recursive self-modeling. Gödel, Escher, Bach.

summary: Adaptive value of forgetting memory curation
content: Forgetting is feature not bug. Enables generalization, reduces interference, supports abstract thinking. Perfect memory can be debilitating.
